Who We Are

About Abhishek Metals

A trusted name in stainless steel utensil manufacturing, rooted in Mumbai's industrial heritage.

Our Story

Precision Manufacturing Built on Trust

Abhishek Metals is a dedicated stainless steel utensils manufacturing company based in Bhayander, Mumbai. We operate from our office in Thakkar Industrial Estate and our production facility in Atmaram Industrial Estate — both located on Navghar Road.

We specialize in producing high-quality stainless steel utensils available in a wide range of types and sizes to meet diverse customer needs. Our products are crafted with precision, ensuring durability and hygiene standards that our customers rely on.

Whether you are a retailer, wholesaler, or bulk buyer, we offer competitive pricing with consistent quality across our entire product range.

Quality Steel Premium grade stainless steel
Multiple Sizes Various types & dimensions
Bulk Orders B2B & wholesale supply
Mumbai Based Local manufacturing hub
⚙️
Manufacturing Excellence
Our factory uses precision manufacturing techniques to ensure each piece meets strict dimensional and quality standards.
🛡️
Durability Assured
We use only high-grade stainless steel to produce utensils that resist corrosion and stand the test of time.
🤝
Customer Focused
From small orders to large bulk requirements, we tailor our service to meet the specific needs of every customer.
Our Products

Product Catalogue

Explore our range of stainless steel utensils — each available in multiple types and sizes.

📋 Each product category is available in multiple types and sizes. Contact us for detailed specifications, pricing, and bulk order quotations.

Spoons & Ladles
A complete range of serving spoons, table spoons, tea spoons, dessert spoons, and cooking ladles in various lengths and designs.

Plates & Thalis
Stainless steel plates, thalis, and platters available in various diameters and designs for everyday use and catering needs.

🥣
Bowls & Katoris
Serving bowls, katoris, and dessert cups in a variety of capacities, from small katoris to large serving bowls.

Containers & Dabbas
Storage containers, dabbas, and tiffin boxes with secure lids available in different capacities for food storage and transport.

🍳

Stainless steel kadhais, pots, and cooking vessels in different sizes suited for household and commercial kitchen use.
Multiple Sizes Multiple Types

Glasses & Tumblers
Drinking glasses, tumblers, and water glasses in classic and modern designs, available in multiple sizes and finishes.
Multiple Sizes Multiple Types
🍶
Jugs & Pitchers
Water jugs, milk pitchers, and serving containers with handles in various capacities and styles.

🔪
Cutlery Sets
Forks, knives, and complete cutlery sets designed for durability and everyday use in homes, hotels, and restaurants.
